name: Spicy Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1 Beat the egg white until foamy.
2 Gradually add cold water and continue beating.
3 Fold in the pecans.
4 In a separate bowl, combine sugar, salt, and cinnamon.
5 Mix the spice mixture into the pecan batter.
6 Grease a 9x13 inch baking pan with butter.
7 Pour the pecan mixture into the prepared pan.
8 Bake at 250°F for 1 hour.
Servings: 12
